title: Mobile viewport safe-area neglect in AI-generated interfaces
summary: AI-generated mobile interfaces fail to account for viewport safe areas (notch, Dynamic Island, home indicator, rounded corners), placing interactive elements in obscured regions.
supportingClaims: Mobile UIs require env(safe-area-inset-*) to avoid placing content behind notches and hardware features.
Fixed-position elements at the bottom of the viewport are particularly susceptible to home-indicator occlusion.
